headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Stock Looks Cheap On Cash Flow But Fair On Earnings
summary: Autodesk stock has retreated over the past five years, yet the latest Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate points to a large gap versus the current market price, while broader valuation checks and market multiples suggest a more tempered, about right picture. Autodesk shares have declined 30.5% over the past five years, which raises the question of whether the current valuation is now too pessimistic or still catching up with fundamentals. Expectations for Autodesk to keep...
